narrative:
Beavercreek 026 (precinct in Greene County) has 681 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
